title: South Pacific Tuna Treaty Act of 2025
short_title: South Pacific Tuna Treaty Act of 2025
stage_label: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
crs_summary: South Pacific Tuna Treaty Act of 2025 This bill revises federal requirements for U.S. commercial fishing vessels operating in the South Pacific. The changes reflect amendments to the South Pacific Tuna Treaty that were agreed to at Nadi, Fiji, on December 3, 2016. The treaty details mutual obligations of the United States and 16 Pacific Island countries when U.S. fishing vessels operate in the region.
last_action_text: Received in the Senate and Read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation.
